name: Vehicle Bill of Sale
description: A legal document that records the transfer of ownership of a motor vehicle from a seller to a buyer.
content:
MOTOR VEHICLE BILL OF SALE

This Motor Vehicle Bill of Sale (the "Agreement") is made and entered into on {{formatDate signature_date}} by and between the Seller and the Buyer named below, establishing the terms of the sale of the described vehicle.

1. THE PARTIES

A. SELLER
Full Name: {{seller_name}}
ID / Driver's License No: {{seller_id_no}}
Address: {{seller_address}}
Phone: {{seller_phone}}

B. BUYER
Full Name: {{buyer_name}}
ID / Driver's License No: {{buyer_id_no}}
Address: {{buyer_address}}
Phone: {{buyer_phone}}

2. VEHICLE DESCRIPTION

The Seller agrees to sell, and the Buyer agrees to purchase, the following vehicle (the "Vehicle"):

  • Make: {{vehicle_make}}
  • Model: {{vehicle_model}}
  • Year: {{vehicle_year}}
  • License Plate / Registration No: {{vehicle_plate}}
  • Vehicle Identification Number (VIN): {{vehicle_vin}}
  • Engine Number: {{vehicle_engine_no}}
  • Odometer Reading: {{vehicle_mileage}} {{mileage_unit}}
  • Color: {{vehicle_color}}
  • Body Type: {{vehicle_body_type}}

3. PURCHASE PRICE AND PAYMENT

The total purchase price of the Vehicle is {{purchase_price}} ({{purchase_price_words}}).

Payment Method: {{payment_method}}

4. TRANSFER AND DELIVERY

The Seller transfers all rights, title, and interest in the Vehicle to the Buyer upon full receipt of the purchase price. The Vehicle shall be physically delivered to the Buyer on {{formatDate delivery_date}} at {{delivery_location}}.

Registration, title transfer fees, and associated taxes shall be the responsibility of the {{#if (eq fees_responsibility 'Buyer')}}Buyer.{{else if (eq fees_responsibility 'Seller')}}Seller.{{else}}Parties equally.{{/if}}

5. SELLER'S REPRESENTATIONS AND "AS-IS" CONDITION

A. Title Warranty: The Seller certifies that they are the legal owner of the Vehicle and have the right to sell it. The Seller warrants that the Vehicle is free and clear of any liens, encumbrances, or past-due taxes/fines.

B. "AS-IS" Condition: The Buyer accepts the Vehicle in its current "AS-IS" condition, with all faults, known or unknown. The Seller makes no warranties, express or implied, regarding the condition of the Vehicle, except as explicitly stated herein. The Seller discloses the following known defects: {{#if known_defects}}{{known_defects}}{{else}}None stated.{{/if}}

By signing below, both parties acknowledge that they have read, understood, and agreed to the terms of this Bill of Sale.

SELLER
{{seller_name}}

Signature: _________________________

BUYER
{{buyer_name}}

Signature: _________________________

fields.name: payment_method
fields.label: Payment Method
fields.placeholder: e.g., Cash, Bank Transfer, Certified Check

fields.name: known_defects
fields.label: Known Defects (Optional)
fields.placeholder: List any dents, mechanical issues, etc.
